properties.note: Control by India but claim by China. Arunachal Pradesh is not equivalent to South Tibet. Arunachal Pradesh includes South Tibet and other parts. See https://www.openstreetmap.org/relation/3202329
properties.note:zh: 中国与印度对该地区存在着领土纠纷。阿鲁纳恰尔邦不等同藏南地区，阿鲁纳恰尔邦包括藏南地区及其它部分。藏南地区参见https://www.openstreetmap.org/relation/3202329
